hero.subtitle: Advanced Machine Learning, AI and DataOps solutions for the consumer goods industry

about.title: About Dharma
about.subtitle: Transforming industrial operations with data and artificial intelligence
about.p1: Dharma Datatech is a company based in Uberlândia, MG, Brazil, focused on the development of advanced Analytics, Machine Learning and AI-driven systems, especially for the consumer goods industry.
about.p2: With over 15 years of experience in research & development, automation & robotics, and DataOps for industrial operations, Dharma is now a resident service provider for the top global players in the consumer goods segment.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for industrial digital transformation
services.s1_desc: Real-time Machine Learning predictions to improve quality, performance and safety of industrial processes.
services.s2_desc: Digital Twin operations and soft-sensing for advanced process monitoring and optimization.
services.s3_desc: Secure integration between factory floor networks (PLC, IoT Mesh, etc.) and cloud-based systems.
services.s4_desc: Enterprise AI solutions integrating multi-level information systems with LLMs using MCP.
services.s5_desc: AI-powered predictive maintenance models with direct integration to DMS systems.
services.s6_desc: Integration of Agentic AI in Business Intelligence systems for smarter decisions.
services.s7_desc: Optimization of production processes and logistics operations with advanced simulation techniques.
services.s8_desc: Carbon emission reduction solutions following the GHG Protocol (Scope 1 to 3).

results.title: Results
results.subtitle: Real impact for our clients
results.r1: Over 10% OEE increase in consumer goods production lines
results.r2: Changeover optimization and downtime reduction in complex production lines
results.r3: Use of Simulation & Optimization to reduce material consumption
results.r4: Complete visibility of all Scope 3 carbon emissions of a global logistics operation with over 10 million entries
results.r5: AI-powered predictive maintenance directly integrated with DMS systems for automatic work order generation
